sealed_before: any Wave-1 evaluation run (pack generation itself is not an evaluation)

B1_fidelity_gate.metric: s2_fidelity compare: thickness-hist KS and entity-mix total variation, synth M-tier pack vs reports/e2/s2/real_stats.json
B1_fidelity_gate.on_fail: generator revision ticket; M-tier results reported as PROVISIONAL

B2_detector_functional.metric: wall_detect v1 per-handle precision/recall vs truth ledgers on S-tier pack (threshold 0.5)

B3_real_coverage_recovery.metric: share of 384 e1 defs where detector v1 scores zero handles, vs v0 zero_frac 0.682 (calibration_v0.json)
B3_real_coverage_recovery.note: measured on staged DXF of 1.dwg via router staging; original READ-ONLY

B4_invariance.metric: S5 battery invariance per rigid transform on S-tier pack, sentinels armed, recall floor 0.5
B4_invariance.pass: invariance >= 0.90 per rotate/translate/mirror/scale; explode/rename report-only in v1
B4_invariance.note: any sentinel trip = automatic FAIL regardless of invariance

B5_silver_alignment.metric: Pearson(detector v1 per-def max-score, E1.5 top-tier mean wall_likelihood merged-vocab)
B5_silver_alignment.note: EXPLORATORY - no band; report value only. Silver is not truth (proxy independence unmeasured until W2).

constraints: no fake PASS - failed bands reported as FAIL with evidence
